items.title: [负面] One thing is impressive about this game - how many...
items.summary:
One thing is impressive about this game - how many good reviews it got.
This is p2w gatcha crap with insanely annoying and long animations.

Even tutorial pissed me off with hand-holding "click this, do this" ♥♥♥♥ off man, you don't release this nonsense on PC.
items.review:
One thing is impressive about this game - how many good reviews it got.
This is p2w gatcha crap with insanely annoying and long animations.

Even tutorial pissed me off with hand-holding "click this, do this" ♥♥♥♥ off man, you don't release this nonsense on PC.

items.title: [正面] Worth playing for the story alone, and the gacha s...
items.summary: Worth playing for the story alone, and the gacha system basically doesn't exist with how much free stuff they hand out. If you like STS-likes or games with incredible stories, play this game. If you don't, probably play it anyway it's amazing
